FactMachine POMDP — market=scalar, policy=myopic, true θ=0.7

Each tick has 5 phases: noise→market, settle, bettor reads+trades, bettor settles, (resolution at t=T). Movables are the coloured dots.

 
Generated by the DES animation plugin (src/des/animation/). Press space to play/pause, ←/→ to step.
